basic_details.job_title: NABARD Student Intern Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 39 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: National Bank for Agriculture and Rural Development (NABARD)
basic_details.short_information: National Bank for Agriculture and Rural Development (NABARD) has officially released the Student Intern Recruitment 2026 notification for 39 vacancies nationwide. Eligible candidates with a Post-graduate degree/PGDM (completed or completing 1st year) or 5-year integrated courses (completed or completing 4th year) in Agriculture and allied disciplines, Agribusiness, Economics, Agri-economics, Social Sciences, or Management, including Indian students studying abroad, can apply online from now until 16 June 2026 via the official NABARD portal. Selected candidates will be appointed on a contractua

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Post-graduate degree/PGDM (completed/completing 1st year) or 5 years integrated courses (completed/completing 4th year) in Agriculture and allied disciplines (Veterinary, Fisheries, etc.), Agribusiness, Economics, Agri-economics, Social Sciences and Management from Institutes/Universities of repute, Indian students studying abroad are also eligible
qualification.details: Post-graduate degree/PGDM (completed/completing 1st year) or 5 years integrated courses (completed/completing 4th year) in Agriculture and allied disciplines (Veterinary, Fisheries, etc.), Agribusiness, Economics, Agri-economics, Social Sciences and Management from Institutes/Universities of repute. Indian students studying abroad are also eligible.

selection_process: Shortlisting on the basis of weighted score system (based on marks in 10th
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 16-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NABARD to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NABARD Student Intern recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the NABARD Student Intern recruitment is 16-06-2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies for the Student Intern post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 39 vacancies announced for the Student Intern position by NABARD. This is a significant opportunity for eligible candidates.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Student Intern role?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have a Post-graduate degree/PGDM (completed/completing 1st year) or a 5-year integrated course (completed/completing 4th year) in specified fields like Agriculture, Economics, or Management from a reputed institute.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for the NABARD Student Intern application?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the NABARD Student Intern recruitment. The application process is free of cost.

faq.question: Q5. What is the monthly stipend for the Student Intern position?
faq.answer: Selected candidates for the Student Intern position will receive a monthly stipend of Rs. 20,000. This is a fixed amount for the internship period.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the NABARD Student Intern recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves two main stages: shortlisting based on academic performance (10th, 12th, and Graduation marks) and a subsequent interview.

faq.question: Q7. Can Indian students studying abroad apply for this internship?
faq.answer: Yes, Indian students who are currently studying abroad are also eligible to apply for the Student Intern position at NABARD.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this NABARD recruitment?
faq.answer: The Student Intern position at NABARD is a contract-based job. This means the role is for a fixed tenure as per the internship program.

faq.question: Q9. How will candidates be shortlisted for the interview?
faq.answer: Candidates will be shortlisted based on a weighted score system, which considers their marks obtained in their 10th standard, 12th standard, and graduation.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification and the online application link can be found in the "Important Links" section of this article. It is recommended to download the notification for complete details.
